name: AgriBank, FCB
summary: AgriBank, FCB provides funding to Farm Credit Associations that provides loans and financial services to farmers, ranchers, and rural businesses and homeowners. The company also offers wholesale funding services; leasing services; risk management services, including credit and enterprise risk management; and corporate and health insurance. In addition, it provides retail bank support services, including product development and support, as well as business services, such as financial reporting, procurement and execution of meeting, and travel services. The company operates in Arkansas, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, South Dakota, Tennessee, Wisconsin, and Wyoming. AgriBank, FCB was founded in 1992 and is based in Saint Paul, Minnesota. AgriBank, FCB operates as a subsidiary of Farm Credit System
